block_00: Psychological patterns that might affect your trading
block_01: Like it or not, your brain often takes charge and makes decisions for you. Often it is a good thing — you don’t need to make a conscious effort to breathe or take steps. But when it comes to trading, your brain may trick you into believing certain biases and following harmful patterns.
block_02: If you ever felt angry about your trades, if your expectations about the outcomes constantly exceed reality and if you can’t find any trading method that would work, this article is for you.
block_03: Read on to find out how to beat your own psychological patterns.
block_04: *This email is not investment advice. The content enclosed is informational only.
